caption: Three-step horizontal flowchart showing the RAG Retrieval-Augmented Generation process: Step 1 RETRIEVE with magnifying glass searching document collection pulling relevant chunks, Step 2 AUGMENT with retrieved documents being attached to query prompt, Step 3 GENERATE with LLM brain icon producing output text with citation markers, each step in its own rounded box with large connecting arrows
alt_text: Three-step RAG flowchart: Retrieve with magnifying glass, Augment combining documents with query, Generate with LLM brain producing cited output
